eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Worth, MO; at 11:41 AM ON APR 17, 2026 Effective until 01:41 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: SEVERE THUNDERSTORM WARNING in effect. Rain, ping pong sized hail, high winds. Take precautions. Moving NE at 45 mph from Maryville. Impacted areas are Sheridan, Irena, Isadora, Athelstan, Worth, Grant City, Denver.
